Email Address:
\b[a-z0-9._%+\-]+@[a-z0-9.-]+\.[a-z]{2,6}\b

Credit Card Number:
\b(?:4[0-9]{12}(?:[0-9]{3})?|5[1-5][0-9]{14}|3[0-9]{13}|3(?:0[0-5]|[0-9])[0-9]{11}|6(?:011|5[0-9]{2})[0-9]{12}|(?:2131|1800|35\d{3})\d{11})\b

IP Address (IPv4):
\b(?:(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\.){3}(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\b

Date of Birth (various formats):
\b(0[1-9]|1[0-2])[/\-](0[1-9]|[12]\d|3[01])[/\-](\d{4}|\d{2})\b

UK Phone Number (with country code, no delimiters):
\b([0O]?[1lI][1lI])?[4A][4A][\dOIlZEASB]{10,11}\b

General IPv6 Address:
\b([0-9a-fA-F]{4}|0)(:([0-9a-fA-F]{4}|0)){7}\b
